DRAFT
  • API Reference
  • foregrounds module
  • View page source

foregrounds module

Models for extragalactic foregrounds (radio, CIB, tSZ, kSZ; based on SPT measurements from George et al. 2015 and Reichardt et al. 2020) and Galactic foregrounds (dust and synchrotron from pySM3 simulations).

foregrounds.compton_y_to_delta_Tcmb(freq1, freq2=None, Tcmb=2.73)[source]
foregrounds.get_cl_dust(freq1, freq2, fg_model='george15', freq0=150, spec_index_dg_po=1.428, spec_index_dg_clus=2.3099999999999996, Tcib=20.0, reduce_cib_power=None)[source]
foregrounds.scale_cl_dust(el, cl_dust_freq0, freq0, freq1, freq2, beta, Tcib, el_slope, el_norm=3000)[source]
foregrounds.get_cl_tsz(freq1, freq2, freq0=150, fg_model='george15', reduce_tsz_power=None)[source]
foregrounds.get_cl_tsz_cib(freq1, freq2, freq0=150, fg_model='george15', spec_index_dg_po=1.428, spec_index_dg_clus=2.3099999999999996, Tcib=20.0, cl_cib_dic=None, reduce_tsz_power=None, cib_flux_threshold=1.5)[source]
foregrounds.get_cl_radio(freq1, freq2, freq0=150, fg_model='george15', spec_index_rg=-0.9, null_highfreq_radio=1, reduce_radio_power_150=None)[source]
foregrounds.smooth_cib_spectra(el, cl, min_el=200, el_knee_guess=2000)[source]
foregrounds.power_law(ell, A, alpha, ell_norm=80.0)[source]
foregrounds.perform_power_law_fit(el, cl, ell_norm=80)[source]
foregrounds.get_cl_galactic(param_dict, component, freq1, freq2, which_spec, which_gal_mask=0, bl_dic=None, el=None, use_power_law_fit=False, use_sed_scaling=True, freq0_for_sed_scaling=278.0, ell_norm=80.0, Tdust=20.0, beta_dust=1.54)[source]
foregrounds.scale_cl_dust_galactic(cl, freq1, freq2=None, freq0=278.0, Tdust=19.6, beta_dust=1.6)[source]
foregrounds.get_cl_dust_galactic(el, freq1, freq2=None, freq0=353.0, el_norm=80.0, el_slope=-0.58, Tdust=19.6, Adust_freq0=4.3, spec_index_dust=1.6, return_dl=0)[source]
foregrounds.get_foreground_power_spt(component, freq1=150, freq2=None, units='uk', lmax=None)[source]

Foreground powers from George et al. 2015 results.

Uses .sav file generated by Christain Reichardt.

Parameters:

  • component (str) – The foreground component to use. Must be one of ‘all’, ‘tSZ’, ‘kSZ’, ‘DG-Cl’, ‘DG-Po’, ‘RG’, ‘tSZ-CIB’, ‘Total’, ‘CMB’

  • freq1 (int) – Frequency band. If freq2 is specified, the cross-spectrum between the two frequencies will be returned. Otherwise autospectrum of freq1.

  • freq2 (int, optional) – Frequency band for cross-spectrum with freq1

  • units (str) – ‘k’ or ‘uk’. Note: default savfile is Dls in uK

Returns:

fgnd_cls – Power spectrum of component at specified frequency band.

Return type:

array

foregrounds.get_dB_dT(nu, nu0=None, temp=2.725)[source]
foregrounds.get_BnuT(nu, temp=2.725)[source]
foregrounds.coth(x)[source]
